# PlaceBets.ai

> Free sports betting tools, live odds, and expert picks for smart bettors. Live prediction market data from Kalshi, +EV calculators, bankroll management tools.

PlaceBets.ai provides free tools and educational content for sports bettors. No signup required. Live market data, EV calculators, bankroll management via Kelly Criterion, and a 159-term gambling glossary.

## Key Pages
- [EV Calculator](https://placebets.ai/calculators)
- [Bankroll Manager (Kelly Criterion)](https://placebets.ai/bankroll)
- [Tournaments & Events](https://placebets.ai/tournaments)
- [EV Betting Strategy](https://placebets.ai/ev-betting)
- [Betting Glossary (159 terms)](https://placebets.ai/glossary)
- [About](https://placebets.ai/about)
- [Contact](https://placebets.ai/contact)

## Glossary Coverage
- Sports Betting (42 terms)
- Poker (35 terms)
- Slots & Casino (25 terms)
- Casino Table Games (27 terms)
- Horse Racing (15 terms)
- DFS & Props (15 terms)

## Legal
Educational content only — not betting or financial advice. 21+ where legal. Gambling Problem? Call 1-800-GAMBLER.
